title: Object Types, Interfaces, Aliases, and Structural Compatibility
description: Design public service records that evolve without silently accepting misspelled, mutable, or incompatible fields. Learners cumulatively produce an evolvable service-record contract library through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Model required, optional, readonly, indexed, and exact-optional property behavior under strict configuration.
Choose interface or type alias from extension, unions, declaration merging, diagnostics, and API intent.
Predict structural assignability while identifying where extra members, methods, and variance create risk.
